projectDescription: A high-conversion landing page designed to promote Halloween events or seasonal product offers with an immersive, spooky atmosphere.

productScope.mvpDefinition: A single-page scrolling experience featuring a thematic hero, event/offer details, a countdown timer, and a lead capture form.
productScope.coreOutcome: Convert visitors into event attendees or seasonal customers through a high-urgency, thematic experience.
productScope.businessGoal: Drive seasonal sales and brand engagement during the Halloween period.
productScope.audienceSummary: Individuals looking for Halloween entertainment, parties, or seasonal discounts.

roles.summary: Potential attendee or customer browsing for Halloween activities.

taskLoops.name: Event Registration Loop
taskLoops.summary: The process of a visitor landing on the page and completing a registration or purchase intent.
taskLoops.entryTrigger: Visitor arrives via social media or ad link
steps: Absorb spooky atmosphere and hero message
Review event attractions or product benefits
Observe the countdown timer for urgency
Fill out the lead capture/booking form
taskLoops.successState: Form submitted and redirected to thank-you state

capabilities.name: Thematic Visual Storytelling
capabilities.summary: Using animations, dark UI, and Halloween motifs to create an emotional connection.

capabilities.name: Conversion Engine
capabilities.summary: Capturing user data through a simplified form or CTA button.

pageMap.title: Halloween Night
pageMap.purpose: Main conversion hub for the Halloween promotion

notes: The site uses a dark-mode default to fit the Halloween theme.

designIntent.colorDirection: Deep midnight purple and charcoal backgrounds with vibrant neon orange and slime green accents.
designIntent.style: Gothic modern with glowing elements and subtle floating animations (ghosts/bats).

layoutSections.intent: Provide quick access to sections while maintaining the theme.
layoutSections.contentHints: Logo with a pumpkin icon, links to 'Attractions', 'Tickets', 'FAQ', and a 'Book Now' CTA with a glowing effect.

designPlan.goal: Orient users quickly and expose the highest-value paths
designPlan.roleFit: Optimize for the Visitor role seeking quick navigation to tickets
designPlan.taskLoopFocus: Help users enter the conversion loop via the 'Book Now' CTA
designPlan.capabilityFocus: Make the thematic immersion evident through gothic typography and glowing accents
designPlan.informationArchitecture: Primary anchor links (Attractions, Tickets, FAQ) and a high-contrast utility CTA
designPlan.layoutIntent: Sticky header with a semi-transparent dark blur background
designPlan.visualIntent: Gothic modern aesthetic with neon orange hover states
designPlan.interactionIntent: Smooth scroll to sections and subtle hover scaling on the CTA
designPlan.contentStrategy: Lead with a thematic logo, followed by clear navigation and a prominent action
constraints: Must maintain high contrast for accessibility on dark backgrounds
designPlan.rationale: A sticky, thematic nav ensures the conversion path is always one click away while reinforcing the mood.

layoutSections.intent: Final brand touchpoint and social links.
layoutSections.contentHints: Social icons (bat-shaped), contact email, copyright, and 'Enter if you dare' newsletter sign-up.

designPlan.role: Final brand touchpoint and secondary conversion
designPlan.goal: Capture remaining interest and provide social proof/contact
designPlan.roleFit: Serves the Visitor who has scrolled to the end without converting yet
designPlan.taskLoopFocus: Secondary entry point for the lead capture loop via newsletter
designPlan.capabilityFocus: Reinforce thematic immersion with playful horror elements
designPlan.informationArchitecture: Newsletter signup, social links, and legal/contact info
designPlan.layoutIntent: Multi-column footer with a dark, textured background
designPlan.visualIntent: Mysterious and nocturnal with slime green accents for the signup button
designPlan.interactionIntent: Simple form validation for the newsletter
designPlan.contentStrategy: Use playful horror copy like 'Enter if you dare' to maintain engagement
constraints: Social icons must have clear alt text
designPlan.rationale: The footer acts as a safety net for conversion while closing the thematic narrative.

pages.title: Halloween Promotion Home
pages.description: The main landing page designed to immerse users in the Halloween spirit and drive conversions.

sections.intent: Immediate thematic impact and primary value proposition.
sections.contentHints: Animated mist background, large 'Spooktacular' title in gothic font, primary CTA button with a pulsing 'blood-orange' glow.

designPlan.role: Page opener and value proposition anchor
designPlan.goal: Hook the visitor immediately with the Halloween theme and a clear action
designPlan.roleFit: Visitor role recognizes the event's quality and excitement instantly
designPlan.taskLoopFocus: First step of the conversion loop: Absorb atmosphere and message
designPlan.capabilityFocus: Thematic immersion via high-quality visuals and typography
designPlan.informationArchitecture: Large H1, sub-headline, and a primary CTA
designPlan.visualIntent: Atmospheric with animated mist and glowing 'blood-orange' accents
designPlan.interactionIntent: Pulsing animation on the CTA to draw the eye
designPlan.contentStrategy: Bold, punchy copy that promises a 'Spooktacular' experience
constraints: Must load quickly to prevent bounce
Mist effect should not obscure text
designPlan.rationale: A centered, high-impact hero is the most effective way to establish the seasonal theme immediately.

sections.intent: Create FOMO and urgency for the event/offer.
sections.contentHints: Digital timer showing Days/Hours/Minutes/Seconds until Halloween night, styled with flickering neon lights.

designPlan.goal: Create a sense of scarcity and time-sensitivity
designPlan.roleFit: Encourages the Visitor to act now rather than later
designPlan.taskLoopFocus: Urgency step in the conversion loop
designPlan.capabilityFocus: Thematic immersion through 'flickering neon' visual style
designPlan.informationArchitecture: Four-unit timer (Days, Hours, Minutes, Seconds) with labels
designPlan.layoutIntent: Full-width horizontal bar or centered block
designPlan.visualIntent: High-contrast neon green or orange on midnight purple
designPlan.contentStrategy: Short, urgent heading like 'The Haunting Begins In...'
constraints: Timer must be accurate to system time
designPlan.rationale: Urgency is a key psychological trigger for seasonal events; the neon style fits the 'modern gothic' aesthetic.

sections.intent: Highlight key attractions or promotion details.
sections.contentHints: Grid of cards (e.g., Haunted House, Costume Contest, Midnight Feast) with spooky icons and short descriptions.

designPlan.goal: Showcase the specific benefits or attractions of the event
designPlan.roleFit: Answers the Visitor's question: 'What do I get?'
designPlan.taskLoopFocus: Review attractions step of the conversion loop
designPlan.capabilityFocus: Thematic immersion through custom icons and card styling
designPlan.visualIntent: Cards with subtle glowing borders and thematic icons (ghosts, bats, pumpkins)
designPlan.interactionIntent: Hover effects that 'lift' the card or intensify the glow
designPlan.contentStrategy: Descriptive, evocative titles paired with short, benefit-driven copy
constraints: Icons must be consistent in style
designPlan.rationale: A grid layout allows for quick scanning of multiple attractions, keeping the visitor engaged.

sections.intent: Present ticket options or product tiers.
sections.contentHints: Three tiers: 'Ghost' (Basic), 'Vampire' (Standard), 'Overlord' (VIP) with price points and list of inclusions.

designPlan.goal: Clearly present options and drive selection of the highest value tier
designPlan.roleFit: Helps the Visitor choose the package that fits their goals
designPlan.taskLoopFocus: Pre-form selection step in the conversion loop
designPlan.capabilityFocus: Lead capture by funneling users toward the registration form
designPlan.informationArchitecture: Three-tier comparison table or card set
designPlan.layoutIntent: Horizontal cards with the middle 'Vampire' tier highlighted
designPlan.visualIntent: Distinctive colors for each tier (e.g., Silver, Red, Gold) within the dark theme
designPlan.interactionIntent: CTA buttons on each card that scroll to the form with the tier pre-selected
designPlan.contentStrategy: Use thematic names for tiers to maintain the 'playful horror' mood
constraints: Pricing must be clear and unambiguous
designPlan.rationale: Thematic tier names (Ghost, Vampire, Overlord) make the boring task of price comparison fun and immersive.

sections.contentHints: Simple fields for Name, Email, and 'Choose your poison' (dropdown for ticket type). Submit button says 'Claim Your Spot'.

designPlan.goal: Collect user data with minimal friction
designPlan.roleFit: Final action for the Visitor to secure their spot
designPlan.taskLoopFocus: Final success state of the conversion loop
designPlan.informationArchitecture: Vertical form with 3-4 fields and a prominent submit button
designPlan.layoutIntent: Narrow, centered container to focus attention
designPlan.visualIntent: Clean input fields with glowing focus states; slime green submit button
designPlan.interactionIntent: Inline validation and a 'success' animation upon submission
designPlan.contentStrategy: Playful copy like 'Choose your poison' for the dropdown
constraints: Minimize fields to increase conversion rate
designPlan.rationale: A simple, thematic form ensures that the excitement built up through the page isn't lost to friction at the final step.

pageDesignPlan.pageGoal: The main landing page designed to immerse users in the Halloween spirit and drive conversions.
pageDesignPlan.capabilityFocus: This page should make Thematic Visual Storytelling, Conversion Engine understandable and actionable.
pageDesignPlan.taskLoopCoverage: Help users progress through Event Registration Loop, Event Registration Loop, Event Registration Loop, Event Registration Loop, Event Registration Loop.
pageDesignPlan.narrativeArc: Move from orientation to persuasion, then social proof, and finish with a decisive conversion close.
pageDesignPlan.layoutStrategy: Use section rhythm, spacing, and contrast to support the entry stage of the user journey rather than making every block equally loud.
hierarchy: The first viewport should establish context and value quickly.
Mid-page sections should deepen trust or explain the offer.
Lower-page sections should reduce friction and reinforce action.
pageDesignPlan.transitionStrategy: Make transitions feel intentional through spacing, contrast shifts, and restrained motion rather than decorative separators.
sharedShellNotes: Assume global layout sections frame the page experience.
Keep page-specific sections visually coherent with the shared shell.
constraints: Preserve the given section order unless a wrapper or grouping is required for coherence.
Avoid repetitive section pacing; vary density and emphasis across the page.
pageDesignPlan.rationale: Default page planner framed Halloween Promotion Home around role needs and the MVP journey rather than isolated sections.
